meta.question: List APS Interfce Requirements and their Acceptence State.
meta.finalAnswer:
**APS Interface Requirements and Their Acceptance States**

The following 8 APS Interface Requirements were found, all with **Accepted** acceptance state:

| Requirement Name | Acceptance State |
|-----------------|------------------|
| APS to CSW ICD | Accepted |
| APS to DMS ICD | Accepted |
| APS to OSS ICD | Accepted |
| APS to SER ICD | Accepted |
| M1CS GLC to APS ICD | Accepted |
| SCMS to APS ICD | Accepted |
| STR to APS ICD | Accepted |
| TCS to APS ICD | Accepted |

All APS Interface Requirements are currently in the **Accepted** state.

request.query:
BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?elem ?type ?name WHERE {
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name ?name . 
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("APS"))) 
  ?elem rdf:type ?type .
}
LIMIT 25

request.reason: Found various APS-related elements including packages, views, and blocks. Need to explore further to find specific APS Interface Requirements and their acceptance states. Will search for requirements with "Interface" in the name.

request.query:
BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?elem ?type ?name WHERE {
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name ?name . 
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("Interface"))) 
  ?elem rdf:type ?type .
}
LIMIT 25

request.reason: Found Interface-related views and properties but not specific requirements. Need to search for tmt:requirement type elements that contain both "APS" and "Interface" in their names or are related to APS interface requirements.

request.query:
BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?elem ?name ?type WHERE {
  ?elem rdf:type vocab:tmt%20requirement .
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name ?name .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("APS")))
}
LIMIT 50

request.reason: Found several APS Interface Requirements (e.g., STR to APS ICD, APS to SER ICD, SCMS to APS ICD, etc.). Now need to explore the properties of these requirements to find their acceptance state. Will map properties of one of these interface requirements.

request.query:
BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?prop (COUNT(*) as ?count) WHERE {
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name "STR to APS ICD" .
  ?elem ?prop ?value .
} 
GROUP BY ?prop 
ORDER BY DESC(?count)
LIMIT 25

request.reason: The exact name match didn't work. Need to use the full URI or try a different approach. Let me explore properties of one of the interface requirements using its URI from the previous result.

request.query:
BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?prop ?value WHERE {
  <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/TMT/tmt%20requirement/TMT::Project::Work%2520Packages::Project%2520Systems%2520Engineering::01%2520Components::Operational::TMT%2520Observatory%2520System::Black%2520Box%2520Specification::TMT%2520Requirements%2520imported%2520from%2520DOORS::DRD%2520APS::APS%2520Requirements::Interface%2520Requirements::STR%2520to%2520APS%2520ICD> ?prop ?value .
}
LIMIT 50

request.reason: Found that the requirement has ownedElements which are instance specifications. These likely contain the acceptance state information. Need to explore the instance specifications to find acceptance state properties.

request.query:
BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?prop ?value WHERE {
  <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/TMT/instance%20specification/_18_0_2_b4c02e1_1428502677878_250778_266157> ?prop ?value .
}
LIMIT 50

request.reason: Found that instance specifications have slots which likely contain the acceptance state values. Need to explore the slot values to find the acceptance state property.

request.query:
BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?slot ?definingFeature ?value WHERE {
  <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/TMT/instance%20specification/_18_0_2_b4c02e1_1428502677878_250778_266157> vocab:InstanceSpecification_slot ?slot .
  ?slot vocab:Slot_definingFeature ?definingFeature .
  ?slot vocab:Slot_value ?value .
}
LIMIT 50

request.reason: Found the Acceptance State property! It's at "Modeling Support::IMCE profle adaption for TMT ::TMT Requirement::Acceptance State" and the value is an instance value. Need to get the actual acceptance state value from the instance value.

request.query:
BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?instanceValue ?value WHERE {
  <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/TMT/instance%20value/_19_0_4_46d01c0_1627813149171_64903_92357> ?prop ?instanceValue .
  ?instanceValue vocab:LiteralString_value ?value .
}
LIMIT 10

request.reason: The instance value structure is different. Need to explore the instance value to find how to get the actual acceptance state string value.

request.query:
BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?prop ?value WHERE {
  <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/TMT/instance%20value/_19_0_4_46d01c0_1627813149171_64903_92357> ?prop ?value .
}
LIMIT 20

request.reason: Found that the acceptance state value points to an enumeration literal "Accepted". Now I can build the final query to get all APS Interface Requirements and their Acceptance States by joining requirements with their instance specifications, slots, and enumeration literals.

request.query:
BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?reqName ?acceptanceState WHERE {
  ?req rdf:type vocab:tmt%20requirement .
  ?req vocab:NamedElement_name ?reqName .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?reqName)), LCASE("APS")))
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?reqName)), LCASE("ICD")))
  
  ?req vocab:Element_ownedElement ?instanceSpec .
  ?instanceSpec rdf:type vocab:instance%20specification .
  ?instanceSpec vocab:InstanceSpecification_slot ?slot .
  ?slot vocab:Slot_definingFeature ?definingFeature .
  ?definingFeature vocab:NamedElement_name "Acceptance State" .
  ?slot vocab:Slot_value ?valueSpec .
  ?valueSpec vocab:InstanceValue_instance ?enumLiteral .
  ?enumLiteral vocab:NamedElement_name ?acceptanceState .
}
ORDER BY ?reqName

request.reason: The query returned empty. The issue might be with how the name matching works or the path. Let me try a different approach - directly query for all APS Interface Requirements and trace through the slots more carefully.

request.query:
BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?reqName ?acceptanceState WHERE {
  ?req rdf:type vocab:tmt%20requirement .
  ?req vocab:NamedElement_name ?reqName .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?reqName)), LCASE("APS")))
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?reqName)), LCASE("ICD")))
  
  ?req vocab:Element_ownedElement ?instanceSpec .
  ?instanceSpec rdf:type vocab:instance%20specification .
  ?instanceSpec vocab:InstanceSpecification_slot ?slot .
  ?slot vocab:Slot_value ?valueSpec .
  ?valueSpec vocab:InstanceValue_instance ?enumLiteral .
  ?enumLiteral vocab:NamedElement_name ?acceptanceState .
  
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?acceptanceState)), LCASE("Accept")) || 
         CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?acceptanceState)), LCASE("Draft")) ||
         CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?acceptanceState)), LCASE("Review")))
}
ORDER BY ?reqName

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?req ?reqName ?instanceSpec ?slot ?valueSpec ?enumLiteral ?acceptanceState WHERE {
  ?req rdf:type vocab:tmt%20requirement .
  ?req vocab:NamedElement_name ?reqName .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?reqName)), "STR to APS ICD"))
  
  ?req vocab:Element_ownedElement ?instanceSpec .
  ?instanceSpec rdf:type vocab:instance%20specification .
  ?instanceSpec vocab:InstanceSpecification_slot ?slot .
  ?slot vocab:Slot_value ?valueSpec .
  ?valueSpec vocab:InstanceValue_instance ?enumLiteral .
  OPTIONAL { ?enumLiteral vocab:NamedElement_name ?acceptanceState }
}
LIMIT 20

request.reason: The string matching with spaces might be causing issues. Let me try using the exact URI pattern or a different filter approach to find the APS Interface Requirements.

request.query:
BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?req ?reqName ?instanceSpec ?slot ?valueSpec ?enumLiteral ?acceptanceState WHERE {
  ?req rdf:type vocab:tmt%20requirement .
  ?req vocab:NamedElement_name ?reqName .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(STR(?reqName), "APS"))
  FILTER(CONTAINS(STR(?reqName), "ICD"))
  
  ?req vocab:Element_ownedElement ?instanceSpec .
  ?instanceSpec rdf:type vocab:instance%20specification .
  ?instanceSpec vocab:InstanceSpecification_slot ?slot .
  ?slot vocab:Slot_value ?valueSpec .
  ?valueSpec vocab:InstanceValue_instance ?enumLiteral .
  OPTIONAL { ?enumLiteral vocab:NamedElement_name ?acceptanceState }
}
LIMIT 30

request.reason: Found the data! The query returns APS Interface Requirements with their Acceptance States. I can see requirements like "STR to APS ICD", "APS to SER ICD", "SCMS to APS ICD", "APS to OSS ICD", "TCS to APS ICD" all with "Accepted" status. Need to refine the query to get distinct requirements with their acceptance states and include all interface requirements.

request.query:
BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?reqName ?acceptanceState WHERE {
  ?req rdf:type vocab:tmt%20requirement .
  ?req vocab:NamedElement_name ?reqName .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(STR(?reqName), "APS"))
  FILTER(CONTAINS(STR(?reqName), "ICD"))
  
  ?req vocab:Element_ownedElement ?instanceSpec .
  ?instanceSpec rdf:type vocab:instance%20specification .
  ?instanceSpec vocab:InstanceSpecification_slot ?slot .
  ?slot vocab:Slot_value ?valueSpec .
  ?valueSpec vocab:InstanceValue_instance ?enumLiteral .
  ?enumLiteral vocab:NamedElement_name ?acceptanceState .
  
  FILTER(CONTAINS(STR(?acceptanceState), "Accept") || 
         CONTAINS(STR(?acceptanceState), "Draft") ||
         CONTAINS(STR(?acceptanceState), "Review") ||
         CONTAINS(STR(?acceptanceState), "Preliminary"))
}
ORDER BY ?reqName

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?reqName ?acceptanceState WHERE {
  ?req rdf:type vocab:tmt%20requirement .
  ?req vocab:NamedElement_name ?reqName .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(STR(?reqName), "APS"))
  FILTER(CONTAINS(STR(?reqName), "ICD"))
  
  ?req vocab:Element_ownedElement ?instanceSpec .
  ?instanceSpec rdf:type vocab:instance%20specification .
  ?instanceSpec vocab:InstanceSpecification_slot ?slot .
  ?slot vocab:Slot_value ?valueSpec .
  ?valueSpec vocab:InstanceValue_instance ?enumLiteral .
  ?enumLiteral vocab:NamedElement_name ?acceptanceState .
}
ORDER BY ?reqName
LIMIT 30

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?reqName (SAMPLE(?acceptanceState) as ?state) WHERE {
  ?req rdf:type vocab:tmt%20requirement .
  ?req vocab:NamedElement_name ?reqName .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(STR(?reqName), "APS"))
  FILTER(CONTAINS(STR(?reqName), "ICD"))
  
  ?req vocab:Element_ownedElement ?instanceSpec .
  ?instanceSpec rdf:type vocab:instance%20specification .
  ?instanceSpec vocab:InstanceSpecification_slot ?slot .
  ?slot vocab:Slot_value ?valueSpec .
  ?valueSpec vocab:InstanceValue_instance ?enumLiteral .
  ?enumLiteral vocab:NamedElement_name ?acceptanceState .
}
GROUP BY ?reqName
ORDER BY ?reqName

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?reqName ?acceptanceState WHERE {
  ?req rdf:type vocab:tmt%20requirement .
  ?req vocab:NamedElement_name ?reqName .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(STR(?reqName), "APS"))
  FILTER(CONTAINS(STR(?reqName), "ICD"))
  
  ?req vocab:Element_ownedElement ?instanceSpec .
  ?instanceSpec rdf:type vocab:instance%20specification .
  ?instanceSpec vocab:InstanceSpecification_slot ?slot .
  ?slot vocab:Slot_value ?valueSpec .
  ?valueSpec vocab:InstanceValue_instance ?enumLiteral .
  ?enumLiteral vocab:NamedElement_name ?acceptanceState .
  
  FILTER(STRSTARTS(STR(?enumLiteral), "http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/TMT/enumeration%20literal/Modeling%20Support::IMCE%20profle%20adaption%20for%20TMT%20::Acceptance%20State::"))
}
ORDER BY ?reqName

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?reqName ?acceptanceState WHERE {
  ?req rdf:type vocab:tmt%20requirement .
  ?req vocab:NamedElement_name ?reqName .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(STR(?reqName), "APS"))
  FILTER(CONTAINS(STR(?reqName), "ICD"))
  
  ?req vocab:Element_ownedElement ?instanceSpec .
  ?instanceSpec rdf:type vocab:instance%20specification .
  ?instanceSpec vocab:InstanceSpecification_slot ?slot .
  ?slot vocab:Slot_value ?valueSpec .
  ?valueSpec vocab:InstanceValue_instance ?enumLiteral .
  
  FILTER(STRSTARTS(STR(?enumLiteral), "http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/TMT/enumeration%20literal/Modeling%20Support"))
  
  BIND(REPLACE(STR(?enumLiteral), ".*::", "") as ?acceptanceState)
}
ORDER BY ?reqName

request.reason: Successfully retrieved all 8 APS Interface Requirements and their Acceptance States. All requirements are in "Accepted" state. The query found: APS to CSW ICD, APS to DMS ICD, APS to OSS ICD, APS to SER ICD, M1CS GLC to APS ICD, SCMS to APS ICD, STR to APS ICD, and TCS to APS ICD.
